title: wolfhsm: algorithm() returns Ok(Ed25519) from stub — false value misleads callers
description: Trigger: any caller that reads backend.algorithm()? and uses the result to select a verifier or interpret a signature. Returns Ok(SigningAlgorithm::Ed25519) from a stub that will never produce Ed25519 signatures. Comment says 'must never be used to interpret a signature' but nothing in the type system communicates this. Fix: return Err(SecretError::Unavailable) matching every other method on the stub. Ok means usable; this stub is not.
